name: maze of pits
description: I'm in a maze of pits
hints: This is a dead-end area of the maze. Head back the way you came.
NORTH or WEST goes to room 12. EAST or UP goes to room 13. Work your way toward room 14.
Go NORTH to return to the maze entrance area (room 12).

effects: Message: You may need to say magic words here

notes: Dead-end area of the pit maze. All exits lead back toward rooms 12 and 13. No items or puzzles here.
